GOI IN WEB - FILE DONG GOI

Noi dung goi:
- IN_NGAY.bat
- IN_DIEN_THOAI_WEB_1_CLICK.bat
- scripts\IN_WEB_1_CLICK.bat
- scripts\start_web_print_bridge.bat
- scripts\web_print_bridge_server.js
- HUONG_DAN_IN_WEB_2_BUOC.txt
- IN_DIEN_THOAI_WEB_2_BUOC.txt

Huong dan nhanh:
1) Giai nen file zip.
2) Tren may tinh o quay: chay file IN_NGAY.bat (hoac IN_DIEN_THOAI_WEB_1_CLICK.bat).
3) Khi duoc hoi, nhap IP may in neu can thay doi.
4) Gui link in web qua chat noi bo, nhan vien bam link de in.
